title: Evangelion at Comic Con
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion at Comic-Con?             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Wed Jul 21, 2010 5:00 pm Do you think that anything Evangelion related will be announced at Comic-Con 2010? Discuss here.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Jul 21, 2010 6:31 pm I highly doubt it. If it was a panel for the Evangelion live action movie maybe, but that movie has been in works for the past several years. So I don't think we will see anything of NGE at the comic con.

[]: Don't get yer hopes up, boy.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Jul 21, 2010 7:25 pm The only thing I can think of that may be announced is Funimation's acquiring of the rights to 2.22, but that's a bit of a stretch considering everything. Other than that, I don't see anything Eva-related going on.

[]: Re: Don't get yer hopes up, boy.             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Jul 21, 2010 11:32 pm Killer Bee wrote: The only thing I can think of that may be announced is Funimation's acquiring of the rights to 2.22, but that's a bit of a stretch considering everything. Other than that, I don't see anything Eva-related going on.
